'''batocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabeach|seabeach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabeach|seabeach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| batocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bætecheth|bætecheth]] || [[word:bætechej|bætechej]] || [[word:bætechesh|bætechesh]] || [[word:bæteche|bæteche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:batotochoth|batotochoth]] || [[word:batotochoj|batotochoj]] || [[word:batotochosh|batotochosh]] || [[word:batotocho|batotocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:batochoth|batochoth]] || [[word:batochoj|batochoj]] || [[word:batochosh|batochosh]] || [[word:batocho|batocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:batofchoth|batofchoth]] || [[word:batofchoj|batofchoj]] || [[word:batofchosh|batofchosh]] || [[word:batofchof|batofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:batochotho|batochotho]] || [[word:batochojo|batochojo]] || [[word:batochosho|batochosho]] || [[word:batochoko|batochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:batochoth|batochoth]] || [[word:batochoj|batochoj]] || [[word:batochosh|batochosh]] || [[word:batocho|batocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:batochothol|batochothol]] || [[word:batochojol|batochojol]] || [[word:batochoshol|batochoshol]] || [[word:batochokol|batochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:batochothotho|batochothotho]] || [[word:batochojojo|batochojojo]] || [[word:batochoshosho|batochoshosho]] || [[word:batochoko|batochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:batochothon|batochothon]] || [[word:batochojon|batochojon]] || [[word:batochoshon|batochoshon]] || [[word:batochokon|batochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:batochothoro|batochothoro]] || [[word:batochojoro|batochojoro]] || [[word:batochoshoro|batochoshoro]] || [[word:batochokoro|batochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
